summary: After successfully defeating a Purple Ogre and receiving a powerful item from Tengi, Hyunwoo Kang prepares for a high-profile arena broadcast. He invites Heather to join the stream for a sparring match against Ria to help her publicly atone for her past as a 'substitute knight.' The event concludes with Heather donating a massive sum of money earned from her past work as a symbolic gesture of her desire to reform and start a new career as a streamer.
key_moments: Hyunwoo Kang defeats the Purple Ogre and receives the 'Memories of Twilight' accessory from Tengi.
Heather spars with Ria during a live broadcast to showcase her skills and address her controversial past.
Heather publicly apologizes for her past actions as a substitute knight and donates one billion to signal her commitment to change.
